CustomField.description: Apex Cursor Rows usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsApexCursorRowsMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsApexCursorRowsConsumed__c / LimitsApexCursorRowsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.ApexCursorRows.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsApexCursorRowsConsumed__c / LimitsApexCursorRowsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.ApexCursorRows.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsApexCursorRowsConsumed__c / LimitsApexCursorRowsMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsApexCursorRowsConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsApexCursorRowsMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Apex Cursor Rows usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: Apex Cursor Rows
